title: CH Remade
description: Changes the textures of the Cosmic Horizons Minecraft mod to fit better with the "Pacific's Specifics" mod textures and just make the Cosmic Horizons textures just more polished.
body:
This Resource Pack was made to remake all of the Cosmic Horizons and Starlance textures to feel more polished and alive while still keeping the vanilla feel.
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~Block Retextures~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
